thesis: Human-defined autonomy is the next platform shift. Follow the money to prove it.

timeline.event: PSPDFKit (Steinberger) gets €100M from Insight Partners
timeline.significance: Steinberger's track record — built $100M+ company before OpenClaw

timeline.event: PSPDFKit rebrands to Nutrient after tripling revenue
timeline.significance: Revenue 3x since Insight investment — Steinberger knows how to scale

timeline.event: CrewAI raises $18M Series A led by Insight Partners
timeline.significance: Same VC (Insight) betting on agentic frameworks

timeline.event: OpenAI raises $40B at $300B valuation
timeline.significance: The gravitational center of AI money

timeline.event: OpenAI employee share sale implies $500B valuation
timeline.significance: 67% valuation jump in 7 months

timeline.event: LangChain raises $125M Series B at $1.25B valuation
timeline.significance: Agent framework unicorn — validates the market

timeline.event: OpenClaw (Clawdbot) initial release by Peter Steinberger
timeline.significance: Weekend project that changes everything

timeline.event: AutoGPT raises $12M
timeline.significance: Early agent framework bet

timeline.event: OpenClaw rebrands, GitHub stars explode to 310K
timeline.significance: Most-starred GitHub project in history in 60 days

timeline.event: ClawHavoc: 341-1184 malicious skills found on ClawHub
timeline.significance: Growth attracts attackers — supply chain risk

timeline.event: CVE-2026-25253: Critical RCE vulnerability (CVSS 8.8)
timeline.significance: Price of rapid adoption without security-first

timeline.event: OpenAI Stargate Project announced — $500B joint venture
timeline.significance: Half a trillion dollars committed to AI infrastructure

timeline.event: Peter Steinberger joins OpenAI ($2-15M deal)
timeline.significance: Creator goes to $730B company — signal of strategic importance

timeline.event: OpenAI raises $110B at $730-840B valuation
timeline.significance: $25B annualized revenue — targeting $1T IPO

timeline.event: OpenClaw transitions to open-source foundation
timeline.significance: Decentralized control — can't be killed

timeline.event: 129 OpenClaw startups generate $283K in 30 days
timeline.significance: Ecosystem economy emerging — avg $2.2K/startup/month

timeline.event: ClawHub grows to 13,729 skills, then 27,000+ by March
timeline.significance: App Store for AI agents — exponential skill creation

timeline.event: Tencent launches QClaw + sponsors OpenClaw community
timeline.significance: China's messaging giant goes all-in on agent paradigm

timeline.event: Alibaba launches JVS Claw + Wukong enterprise platform
timeline.significance: E-commerce giant restructures around AI agents

timeline.event: Baidu launches DuClaw zero-deployment + DoctorClaw
timeline.significance: Search giant pivots to agentic healthcare

timeline.event: Nvidia launches NemoClaw enterprise security hardening
timeline.significance: GPU king sees agents as next compute driver

timeline.event: China AI agents market valued at $577B, projected $14.8T by 2033
timeline.significance: 50.8% CAGR — the biggest tech market in history

timeline.event: Chinese government restricts OpenClaw for state agencies
timeline.significance: Powerful enough to warrant government intervention

timeline.event: Chinese local govts offer up to $1.4M subsidies for OpenClaw projects
timeline.significance: Government financing the agent economy

patterns.name: The Acquihire Signal
patterns.description: OpenAI paid $2-15M for Steinberger — not for code (it's open source), but for the COMMUNITY. 310K GitHub stars, 15K contributors, 27K skills. You don't buy what's free; you buy what's irreplaceable: mindshare.

patterns.name: The China Paradox
patterns.description: China restricts OpenClaw for government use while simultaneously subsidizing $1.4M per OpenClaw project AND three tech giants launch competing agents. They fear it AND need it. That's how you know it's transformative.

patterns.name: The Skills Economy = New App Store
patterns.description: ClawHub went from 0 to 27,000 skills in months. Individual devs earn $100-$1K/month. 12-20% contain malware. This IS the early App Store — same explosive growth, same security chaos, same gold rush economics.

patterns.name: The VC Convergence
patterns.description: Insight Partners funded both PSPDFKit ($116M) and CrewAI ($18M). Sequoia/Benchmark funded LangChain ($160M). YC, a16z, Accel all in. Every major VC firm is placing bets on the agent layer. $7B in 2025 alone.

patterns.name: The SaaS Extinction Event
patterns.description: If agents can orchestrate any API, why pay for 50 SaaS tools? OpenClaw startups are already replacing micro-SaaS with $125 setup + $150/mo managed plans. The $200B SaaS market has a new predator.

patterns.name: Nvidia's Hedge
patterns.description: NemoClaw isn't charity — Nvidia knows agents will consume 10-100x more compute than chatbots. Every agent running 24/7 = perpetual token burn = perpetual GPU demand. They're building the picks and shovels for the gold rush.

thesis_verdict: CONFIRMED. Human-defined autonomy IS the next platform shift. The evidence is overwhelming: $7B+ VC in agentic AI (2025), $577B China market, OpenAI at $840B absorbing the movement's creator, three Chinese tech giants pivoting simultaneously, Nvidia building enterprise hardening, and a nascent $283K/month startup ecosystem that mirrors early mobile app economics. The speed of adoption — 310K GitHub stars in 60 days — has no precedent in open source history.
